goal: Add a real desktop (>=1024px) layout for the homepage and the /widgets page, translated from the claude.ai/design 'MeowTarot Desktop' mockup, without touching mobile or the iOS wrap.
done: New css/desktop-home.css (every rule gated @media (min-width:1024px), scoped to body[data-page='home']) hides the mobile home sections on desktop and shows a new .mtd-home block: hero with fanned card backs + dual CTAs, three reading-mode cards, a real-art deck gallery (CDN 00-back.webp, 4 available + 2 locked with day labels), and a dark WIDGET SHOWCASE BAND highlighting the free embeddable widget. Mirrored EN (index.html) + TH (th/index.html, Thai copy; added Noto Serif Thai / IBM Plex Sans Thai fallbacks to the shared CSS so Thai headings render correctly). Rebuilt widgets/index.html to the design's desktop layout (centered hero, numbered Universal-embed + WordPress cards, sticky live-preview iframe) while preserving all existing embed-builder/copy/preview JS; responsive down to mobile. Invented mockup stats (120k rituals / 3,200 sites / 1.2M draws) replaced with honest value props in both languages.
verified: Rendered headless at 1440px (EN home, TH home, widgets) and 390px (EN/TH home, widgets): desktop two-column layouts correct; mobile byte-identical (the .mtd-home block is display:none below 1024px). Real deck back images load from cdn.meowtarot.com. NOT yet QA'd in a real browser — pushed to a staging branch for the Cloudflare Pages preview deploy before any production merge.
